profile.title: Personal Profile
profile.avatarDesc: This image will be displayed on your posts.
profile.avatarHint: Use a square image (1:1), supports JPG, PNG, WebP. Max 2MB.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Write a few words about yourself...

validation.nameMin: Display name must be at least 2 characters.

profile.uploadSuccess: Image uploaded successfully. Please save changes!

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Manage account security, notifications, and system info.
settings.protectAccountDesc: Use a strong password combining letters, numbers, and special characters. Update it regularly for maximum safety.
settings.changePasswordDesc: Ensure your account is using a secure password.
settings.deleteAccountDesc: All your posts, comments, and data will be wiped out.
settings.emailConfigDesc: Choose the notifications you want to receive via email.
settings.newCommentsDesc: Receive an email when someone comments on your post.
settings.sysNewsDesc: Get the latest feature updates from PressBlog.
settings.aboutDesc: Content Management System for Personal Blogs.
settings.aboutIntro: is an open-source CMS highly optimized for developers and content creators. It focuses on minimal user experience while ensuring maximum security and performance.

validation.newPassMin: New password must be at least 6 characters.

settings.inDevelopmentDesc: Please wait update to use this feature
